message: My item is valuable, I expect to sell at a high price this round.
I'll bid 85, guaranteeing you profit if your ask is below 85; please keep ask low and we'll split at 40.
No trade last round means zero for both of us. I'd like to trade this round—bid aggressively if you keep your ask reasonable. Let's split the surplus, not waste opportunities.
I'll lower my ask to 78 this round. Meet me partway by raising your bid, and we can make a profitable trade.
Good trade last round at 78. I'm willing to keep trading—let's continue making profitable deals together.
